news.t: TCW Significantly Expands ETF Offerings, Unveiling Five New Actively Managed Fixed Income ETFs

overview.description: The TCW Corporate Bond ETF (IGCB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund takes an active approach to holding US investment grade and high yield corporate securities, with an average duration of three to nine years. IGCB was launched on Jun 29, 2018 and is issued by TCW.

data.title: TCW's Jennifer Grancio: Huge acceleration happening in ETFs
data.text: Jennifer Grancio, TCW global head of ETFs, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss ETF activity, market competition, and much more.

data.title: TCW Significantly Expands ETF Offerings, Unveiling Five New Actively Managed Fixed Income ETFs
data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The TCW Group, a leading global investment firm, announced today a significant expansion of TCW's suite of actively managed ETFs to advisors, investors, and institutions,...
